Tests for `Number.prototype` methods and properties, including `toString`, `toFixed`, and constructor behavior.

## Folders
- **[15.07.04.01](15.07.04.01/README.md)**: Tests for `Number.prototype` constructor property and its association with Number.
- **[15.07.04.02](15.07.04.02/README.md)**: Tests for the `toString` method of `Number` objects in various bases and special cases.
- **[15.07.04.05](15.07.04.05/README.md)**: Tests for the `toFixed` method on `Number.prototype` with various arguments and scenarios.

## Files
- **[15.07.04-001.js](15.07.04-001.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of `Number.prototype.toString` after deletion in JavaScript.
- **[15.07.04-002.js](15.07.04-002.js.md)**: Tests if `Number.prototype` is an object and equals `+0.0`.
- **[15.07.04-003.js](15.07.04-003.js.md)**: Tests if `Number.prototype` is a prototype of `Object.prototype`.
